subject: Re: Welcome to the cohort
body: Hi Sid, I just joined the cohort but I don't have a project idea yet. I'm a bit worried — what happens if I still don't have one by week 3? Is that a problem? Thanks, Maya

subject: Is this course right for me + price?
body: Hey Sid, I follow your newsletter. I'm a non-technical PM and I've never written code. Is Build with Claude Code actually doable for someone like me, and what does it cost? Trying to decide this week. Tom

subject: Sponsoring your newsletter
body: Hi Sid, we'd love to sponsor JustAnotherPM. Could you share your rates and audience numbers? We're thinking a multi-post package. Priya, GrowthLoop

subject: the course is a bit out of my budget
body: Hi Sid, I really want to join but $600 is a lot for me right now given the exchange rate. Is there any discount or payment plan you could offer? Dev

subject: Paid but no confirmation
body: Hi, I paid for the course yesterday but never got a confirmation email. Can you check if my payment went through? Ana
